title: enteropogon macrostachyus
intro: Enteropogon macrostachyus, also known as 'Kans Grass', is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Enteropogon macrostachyus include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and powdered for use in capsules or as a topical cream.
